chunks.text: ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No. S- 183 of 2019. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 22.03.2019. 1. For orders on M.A. No. 324/2019. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For hearing of main case. Mr. Faiz Muhammad Larik, Advocate for petitioners. ~~~~~~~ 1. Urgency application granted. 2. Over-ruled. 3. Through instant petition, petitioner Mst. Zakia and Fida Hussain have alleged harassment at the hands of private respondents Mour and others on account of their family affairs and also seek legal protection. It is alleged by petitioners that they are legally married to each other and have three minor kids from the wedlock, but respondent No.3, namely, Mour Soomro, who happen to be father of petitioner Mst. Zakia has become greedy and wants to sale petitioner No.1 to someone else against monetary gains, as such, he in collusion with rest of private respondents has been causing harassment to petitioners and compelling petitioner No.1 Mst. Zakia to get divorce from petitioner No.2 Fida Hussain, which the petitioners do not want, as they, according to them, are passing happy marital status cum life. It is alleged that, area police is also in league with the private respondents. On query, learned counsel for petitioners admits that he has not approached the S.S.P Complaint Cell of the concerned district. Accordingly, office is directed to send copy of instant petition and its annexures, if any, to S.S.P Complaint Cell, Jacobabad. Since, there are allegations of malfeasance and misfeasance against police, as such the S.S.P Complaint Cell, shall conduct probe in the matter and complete enquiry within two weeks and redress grievance of the petitioners.

Accordingly, office is directed to send copy of instant petition and its annexures, if any, to S.S.P Complaint Cell, Jacobabad. Since, there are allegations of malfeasance and misfeasance against police, as such the S.S.P Complaint Cell, shall conduct probe in the matter and complete enquiry within two weeks and redress grievance of the petitioners. The office is directed to issue directions to SHO, P.S Abad, Jacobabad, to produce respondent No.1 (Mour Soomro), before S.S.P Complaint Cell, Jacobabad. Needless to mention here that, no harassment shall be caused to the petitioners directly or indirectly at the behest of private respondent and the official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. The petition stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Ansari/*
